name: @pratibimba/omnipanel-shell
description: The canonical `/` command membrane for the Pratibimba System Theia shell. Wraps Theia's CommandRegistry into the OmniPanel surface — summons commands across both workspace layouts, routes layout-summon intents, and shows kernel-bridge readiness inline. Migration target for Body/S/S3/epi-app/renderer/components/OmniPanel.tsx + omni/* sub-tree and the Tauri OmniPanel.tsx slim port. Track 05 T2 scaffold; T5 promotes to full cross-layout intent routing.
